page_metadata.biotools__summary: AptaDB is an online database that integrated comprehensive information on aptamers. It collects thousands of aptamers obtained from SELEX-based screening in the literature and and other databases, which may facilitate biologists to develop novel aptamers and accelerate aptamer-related researches.
